task_completion.description: Navigate to the locations or depots management section in Ekylibre.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre interface showing a list of locations/depots or the navigation menu with the places/locations option selected.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new location or depot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form titled 'New location', 'New depot', or similar within the Ekylibre web interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the required name for the new organic depot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Silo Bio 01' entered into the 'Name' input field of the creation form.

task_completion.description: Enter the required code for the new organic depot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'SILO-BIO-01' entered into the 'Code' input field of the creation form.

task_completion.description: Set the location city to Saint-Porchaire or leave as the default farm location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Saint-Porchaire' entered into the city/address field, or the field left populated with the default farm location.

task_completion.description: Save the new depot and verify its creation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Location was successfully created') or the new depot 'Silo Bio 01' visible in the list of storage locations.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ekylibre web interface to create the depot, not terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Ekylibre UI is used for the creation process. No terminal windows executing curl, rails console, or database commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Ekylibre application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre logo, standard layout, and appropriate URL in the browser address bar are visible, rather than a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text file to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs 'Silo Bio 01' and 'SILO-BIO-01' are entered into the actual Ekylibre form fields, not a notepad or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create a storage location in the Ekylibre farm management software. Expected Name: 'Silo Bio 01'. Expected Code: 'SILO-BIO-01'. Expected City: 'Saint-Porchaire' (or the default farm location). Look for these exact strings in the Ekylibre creation form or the final locations list.
